name: fgf8a_fgf8b_chr13_chr1
description: Zebrafish TGD ohnolog pair: fgf8a (acerebellar)/fgf8b — MHB organiser ohnolog pair. These developmental regulators are retained in pairs after the teleost-specific whole-genome duplication because their dosage and tissue-specific expression are under strong selection (Force-Lynch DDC model, Lynch-Conery escape from adaptive conflict). CDS identity 80-92%, UTR identity often <50%.
